name: Fruktsoppa (Old-fashioned Fruit Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 Tart cooking apple, peeled, cored and cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots and prunes in 6 cups cold water for 30 minutes.
2. Use a saucepan with at least a 3-quart capacity to hold the soaking fruit.
3. Add the cinnamon stick, lemon slices, tapioca, and sugar to the pan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Reduce the heat and cover the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally with a wooden spoon to prevent the fruits from sticking to the bottom of the pan.
6. Stir in the raisins, currants, and apple slices.
7. Continue simmering for an additional 5 minutes, or until the apples are tender and easily pierced with a sharp knife or skewer.
8. Remove the cinnamon stick and let the soup cool to room temperature.
9. Cover the bowl tightly with plastic wrap and refrigerate until chilled.
10. Serve the fruit soup in compote dishes or soup bowls as a light year-round dessert.
